title: REKAM JEJAK COP SELAMATKAN SATWA PASCA BANJIR TAPANULI SELATAN
summary: COP Centre for Orangutan Protection rescued and provided care to animals affected by a major flood in Tapanuli Selatan, Sumatra.

title: 11 seized orangutans repatriated
summary: 11 Sumatran Orangutans were seized from illegal trade operations in Malaysia and Thailand and repatriated to Indonesia.

title: Aceh bust uncovers vast Indonesia-Thailand wildlife trafficking route
summary: Customs enforcers in Aceh intercepted a truck carrying an orangutan along with other wildlife destined for Thailand, revealing a significant smuggling network.

title: Action Plan to protect Great Apes finalized
summary: The article discusses the finalization of a Global Strategy for Great Apes Survival by GRASP, highlighting poaching and illegal trade as key threats to great apes, particularly mentioning orangutans being taken from the wild for pets or zoos.
